mapper.select:
SELECT pi.product_id, p.product_name, p.unit, pi.lot_no, GREATEST( pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = pi.product_id AND po.lot_no = pi.lot_no ), 0), 0 ) AS stock_qty, 50 AS safe_qty, pi.reg_date, pi.expire_date FROM product_inbound pi JOIN product p ON pi.product_id = p.product_id
(p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pi.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND pi.reg_date >= #{startDate}
AND pi.reg_date <= #{endDate}
AND ( pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = pi.product_id AND po.lot_no = pi.lot_no), 0) - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(sr.reserved_qty) FROM stock_reservation sr WHERE sr.product_id = pi.product_id AND sr.lot_no = pi.lot_no), 0) ) >= 50
AND ( ( pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = pi.product_id AND po.lot_no = pi.lot_no), 0) - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(sr.reserved_qty) FROM stock_reservation sr WHERE sr.product_id = pi.product_id AND sr.lot_no = pi.lot_no), 0) ) BETWEEN 1 AND 49 )
AND ( ( pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = pi.product_id AND po.lot_no = pi.lot_no), 0) - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(sr.reserved_qty) FROM stock_reservation sr WHERE sr.product_id = pi.product_id AND sr.lot_no = pi.lot_no), 0) ) = 0 )
ORDER BY pi.reg_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_stock (product_id, lot_no, stock_qty, safe_qty, reg_date, expire_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{qty}, 50, NOW(), #{expireDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_qty = stock_qty + #{qty}, expire_date = #{expireDate}
mapper.select: SELECT pi.product_id, pi.lot_no, pi.inbound_qty, IFNULL(po.total_outbound_qty, 0) AS total_outbound_qty, IFNULL(sr.total_reserved_qty, 0) AS reserved_qty, (pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(po.total_outbound_qty, 0) - IFNULL(sr.total_reserved_qty, 0)) AS available_qty, pi.expire_date FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, SUM(outbound_qty) AS total_outbound_qty FROM product_outbound GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, SUM(reserved_qty) AS total_reserved_qty FROM stock_reservation GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) sr ON pi.product_id = sr.product_id AND pi.lot_no = sr.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} HAVING available_qty > 0 ORDER BY pi.expire_date ASC

SELECT pt.*, c.client_name FROM product_transaction pt LEFT JOIN client c ON pt.client_id = c.client_id WHERE pt.lot_no = #{lotNo} AND pt.type NOT IN ('RESERVE', 'CANCEL_RESERVE') ORDER BY pt.reg_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_stock SET reserved_qty = reserved_qty + #{qty}, available_qty = GREATEST(available_qty - #{qty}, 0) WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND lot_no = #{lotNo}
UPDATE product_stock SET reserved_qty = GREATEST(reserved_qty - #{qty}, 0), available_qty = stock_qty - GREATEST(reserved_qty - #{qty}, 0) WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND lot_no = #{lotNo}
mapper.select: SELECT ps.product_id, p.product_name, ps.lot_no, ps.reg_date, ps.expire_date, ps.stock_qty, ps.reserved_qty, ps.available_qty, pt.type, pt.qty, pt.reg_date AS transaction_date, pt.remark, c.client_name FROM product_stock ps LEFT JOIN product_transaction pt ON ps.lot_no = pt.lot_no LEFT JOIN client c ON pt.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN product p ON ps.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ps.lot_no = #{lotNo}
